xml.sax.xmlreader/XMLReader/parse.name: parse
xml.sax.xmlreader/XMLReader/parse.description: Process an input source, producing SAX events. The source object can be a system identifier (a string identifying the input source – typically a file name or a URL), a pathlib.Path or path-like object, or an InputSource object. When parse() returns, the input is completely processed, and the parser object can be discarded or reset. Changed in version 3.5: Added support of character streams. Changed in version 3.8: Added support of path-like objects.
